items.name_cn:
Top-tier upgraded version
Size 23×13×6cm
Dior Miss Caro Shoulder Bag, large oversized woven pattern in pink lambskin. Many also call it the 'Dumpling Bag'. It is a new arrival from the 2025 Early Spring collection, enriching the Miss Caro series with stylish and refined pieces ✨. Featuring original pink lambskin, decorated with a large woven pattern stitching to enhance the look, paired with decorative matching straps, and a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo on the front. It looks high-class and elegant when carried casually.
Great for photos and styling!

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Upgraded Version
Size: 21 x 11.5 x 4.5cm
Lady Dior Woc Handle Pearl Chain Bag, Spring/Summer New Arrival, crafted from calfskin, featuring the Dior Oblique pattern. The flap design with a D.I.O.R. charm elevates the style. Practical with multiple compartments and card slots for daily essentials, it is an ideal companion for both day and evening wear. Equipped with a top handle and a detachable chain adorned with resin beads, it can be carried by hand or worn crossbody.

items.name_cn:
Top-tier with full set
🖤Super mini Diana Bag 3-compartment🖤
Dior Lady Micro Bag
So cute and tiny! The super mini black and gold combination is simple, elegant, and imposing. The bag embodies Dior's profound insight into refinement and beauty. Crafted from calfskin, it features guilloche quilting and a signature silhouette accented with charms. The mini size holds various small essentials, making it the perfect companion for evening looks.
Model: 0856
Dimensions: 12*10*5cm.

items.name_en: Toujours Vertical Medium, the exclusive 'market bag', is simply beautiful. A high-appeal bag that effortlessly exudes sophistication. Featuring an oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, it offers a modern and stylish look. The bag structure is very soft, and the calfskin material feels premium. The unique buckle fastening allows the sides to fold when closed. It comes with a long shoulder strap, scoring full marks for practicality and capacity, easily holding all daily essentials.

items.name_en: Travel Bag 💫MCM💫 Traveler Visetos Weekend Travel Bag. Made of durable Visetos print 🌺 coated canvas and bonded lining, this item reduces weight and is one of our top lightweight Visetos weekend ✈️ travel bags. This classic design features an easy-to-close extended ⛓️ zipper and can be folded for storage when not in use. Dimensions: Length 50cm, Height 29cm, Bottom Thickness 20cm
